title: leontodon saxatilis subsp. perennis
intro: Leontodon saxatilis subsp. perennis, also known as perennial hawk's beard or winter hawk's beard, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Leontodon saxatilis subsp. perennis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its roots can be used in decoctions and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
